member.summary: Gets the picture key assigned to the passed in .
member.param: The for which the picture key should be returned.
Indicates whether the generared picture key should be generated for a device or not.
Indicates whether the retunred picture should be the original or not. That means that no dyed or combined picture will be returned.
member.returns: The picture key assigned to the passed in .

member.name: M:Comos.PicturesLibrary.PictureKeyGenerator.KeyForDocument(Plt.IComosDDocument)
member.summary: Gets the picture key for the passed in .
member.param: The comos document for which the picture key should be generated.
member.returns: The picture key for the passed in .

members.member:
Gets the picture key for the passed in . This document should be of the Type: DocumentTypeGeneralDocument otherwise will be returned.
The comos document for which the picture key should be generated. This document should be of the Type: DocumentTypeGeneralDocument otherwise will be returned.
The picture key for the passed in . If the passed in isn't of the Type: DocumentTypeGeneralDocument null (Nothing in VisualBasic) will be returned.
IVO RQ949611 07.04.2014: so genannte Netlogin Dokumente haben den gleichen Type wie DDM-Dokumente,

members.member:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DMY/ADMADI 2010-04-28 F16025 (GDI-Resourcen) (Klemmenplan-Listy (ConList.OCX) Re-Implementierung der Icons aus BridgeImages.OCX (PT55-Level) für Wpf-Umgebung. Dandaurndes OlePictureByKey und Umfärben mit PicMgr.XPicture bewirken, dass die GDI-Handles bei alten Klemmenplan-Listys (Device/ConList.OCX) sehr stark ansteigen. Daher Umbau und Verlagerung in gecachte PicturesLibrary
Betroffene Module: DEVICE/Conlist QUERY/ExtendedObjects -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
